assertions.reason: Credential masking in screenshots/logs still requires a live credentialed run plus artifact inspection, and the fresh browser flow never reached executable runs or artifacts.
Whether encrypted credential payloads are stripped from frontend query responses remains a backend/data-contract assertion rather than a browser-visible behavior.

A fresh browser account could import/publish a pack and create a study, but the live study only reached persona review and the report tab stayed `Report not ready`, so a completed live pack→study→analysis→report pipeline is still not reachable from the browser surface.
Credential-ref leakage still requires a live credentialed study with artifacts to inspect, and the browser flow never reached executable runs or artifacts.
Concurrent-study isolation still requires two live completed studies with separate analysis outputs; this rerun did not reach even one live completed analyzed study from the browser.
Error-recovery integrity still requires inducing an analysis failure and then inspecting preserved run/milestone state, which is not directly observable from the browser surface.

frictions.description: Visible variant generation remained stuck on `Generating variants...` for more than 28 seconds with no accepted variants surfacing.
frictions.resolution: Captured the stalled personas tab and used the still-empty live report tab as evidence that the pipeline never completed.

blockers.description: The browser flow still cannot reach a completed live analyzed study; it stalls at persona review / generating variants and leaves the report tab not ready.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Imported and published a fresh pack, created a study from the browser, launched it, triggered variant generation, and checked the report tab, but the flow never progressed to a completed analyzed report.

summary: The live hardening pipeline remains blocked from the browser because the study stalls before generating a real analyzed report or any credential-bearing run artifacts.
